specific_location: In a large hedge row on the north side of the school on the north side of the town of Haxtun.
description: It was a small dove. It had a small dark bill and a red eye. The color of the bird was a tan color. It had a long tail. It had scaly edges on the back, face, and belly. It had a pale pink feet and legs. In flight I was able to see rufous underwings and white on the outer tail feathers.Behaviors: I was sitting in a thick row of junipers. When I finally was able to see it the bird flew north to a farm yard, I am guessing I accidentally flushed it off. I wasn’t able to obtain photos.Call: It was giving a two part song that sounded like NO HOPE which was being repeated over and over.Plumage: Adult
